title: Reset password
description: Enter the email address linked to your account. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errorNoInternet: No internet connection. Reconnect and try again.
checkMailboxDesc: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
successGeneric: If this email is linked to an account, we'll send a reset link shortly.
errorGeneric: Couldn't reset your password. Please try again.
errorDefault: Couldn't reset your password. Please try again.
